case_title: MUHAMMAD SALEM VS. EVERLEANA LACELL SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALEM, MUHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, EVERLEANA LACELL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

CA. 94103, AND INCLUDING ALL OTHER UN-NAMED OCCUPANTS IN THE PREMISES, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
